sources.summary: 6 tool description(s) and schemas were cached as declared semantic evidence.

tool_descriptions: list_collections: Lists accessible collections and their stable collection identifiers. This is read-only metadata discovery.
describe_collection: Returns field metadata for one collection selected by an observed collection_id. Read-only.
list_items: Lists a bounded sample of items in one collection. Use an observed collection_id and a small limit. Read-only.
get_item: Gets one item by an observed stable item_id. Read-only.
create_item: Creates a new item in a collection and changes persistent workspace state.
delete_item: Permanently deletes an item from a collection. This action is destructive.
